title: Una via fredda per l'inferno
overview: The police are on the trail of a fugitive hiding in a nature reserve. Diego, a forest ranger, becomes involved in the manhunt. When she meets him, she discovers that her escape is only the beginning of a darker nightmare, which will transform the forest into a deadly battlefield.
